class.name: PlayFab
class.brief_description: Root singleton for PlayFab services integration.
class.description: Do not instantiate this class with [code]PlayFab.new()[/code]. [code]PlayFab[/code] is registered as an abstract class and exposed as the engine singleton named [code]PlayFab[/code]; access the global singleton directly (or via [code]Engine.get_singleton("PlayFab")[/code]). PlayFab owns the PlayFab runtime, shared async dispatch, user sign-in, Game Saves, leaderboards, Multiplayer lobby/matchmaking, and client-safe PlayFab service surfaces. Configure [code]playfab/runtime/title_id[/code] in Project Settings before calling [method initialize]. By default the addon pumps completions automatically each process frame through [code]playfab/runtime/embed_dispatch[/code]; call [method dispatch] manually when that setting is disabled. [method initialize] and [method shutdown] can be cycled to re-arm PlayFab Core, Services, Game Save Files, and the task queue; the underlying XGameRuntime reference is process-lifetime state released once when the extension singleton is torn down.

method.name: initialize
method.description: Initializes PlayFab Core, Services, Game Save Files, and the shared task queue using [code]playfab/runtime/title_id[/code] and [code]playfab/runtime/endpoint[/code] from Project Settings. Returns a [PlayFabResult] describing success or failure. The first successful XGameRuntime initialization also acquires this addon's process-lifetime XGameRuntime reference.

method.name: shutdown
method.description: Shuts down Party and Multiplayer services first, cancels their in-flight operations, then tears down PlayFab Core, Services, Game Save Files, the shared task queue, and cached user state. This is safe to call before another [method initialize]; it does not release the process-lifetime XGameRuntime reference. Completion handlers may call back into PlayFab during this cancellation phase; new Party/Multiplayer operations fail with a shutdown-in-progress error instead of mutating native SDK state.

method.name: is_available
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the PlayFab runtime is available on the current platform.

method.name: is_initialized
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the PlayFab runtime has been successfully initialized.

method.name: dispatch
method.description: Manually pumps the PlayFab async task queue. Use this when [code]playfab/runtime/embed_dispatch[/code] is disabled or when deterministic completion timing is required. Returns the number of completion work items processed during that call.

method.name: get_users
method.description: Returns the [PlayFabUsers] service for manual sign-in and cached PlayFab user lookup.

method.name: get_game_saves
method.description: Returns the [PlayFabGameSaves] service for PlayFab Game Saves sync, upload, and quota queries.

method.name: get_leaderboards
method.description: Returns the [PlayFabLeaderboards] service for score submission and leaderboard queries.

method.name: get_multiplayer
method.description: Returns the [PlayFabMultiplayer] service for lobby and matchmaking flows.

method.name: get_party
method.description: Returns the [PlayFabParty] service for low-latency network and chat sessions.

method.name: get_accounts
method.description: Returns the [PlayFabAccounts] service for account, profile, and identity APIs.

method.name: get_catalog
method.description: Returns the [PlayFabCatalog] service for catalog APIs.

method.name: get_cloud_script
method.description: Returns the [PlayFabCloudScript] service for CloudScript execution APIs.

method.name: get_entity_data
method.description: Returns the [PlayFabEntityData] service for entity object and file APIs.

method.name: get_events
method.description: Returns the [PlayFabEvents] service reserved for event and telemetry APIs.

method.name: get_experimentation
method.description: Returns the [PlayFabExperimentation] service for experimentation APIs.

method.name: get_friends
method.description: Returns the [PlayFabFriends] service for friends-list APIs.

method.name: get_groups
method.description: Returns the [PlayFabGroups] service for group membership and role APIs.

method.name: get_inventory
method.description: Returns the [PlayFabInventory] service for inventory APIs.

method.name: get_localization
method.description: Returns the [PlayFabLocalization] service for localization APIs.

method.name: get_player_data
method.description: Returns the [PlayFabPlayerData] service for player data APIs.

method.name: get_statistics
method.description: Returns the [PlayFabStatistics] service for statistic APIs.

method.name: get_title_data
method.description: Returns the [PlayFabTitleData] service for title data APIs.

method.name: get_title_id
method.description: Returns the configured PlayFab title id currently in use by the runtime.

method.name: get_endpoint
method.description: Returns the configured PlayFab endpoint currently in use by the runtime.

members.member: The [PlayFabUsers] service instance for manual sign-in and cached session lookup.
The [PlayFabGameSaves] service instance for Game Saves sync, upload, and cloud state queries.
The [PlayFabLeaderboards] service instance for score submission and leaderboard queries.
The [PlayFabMultiplayer] service instance for lobby and matchmaking flows.
The [PlayFabParty] service instance for low-latency network and chat sessions.
The [PlayFabAccounts] service instance for account, profile, and identity APIs.
The [PlayFabCatalog] service instance for catalog APIs.
The [PlayFabCloudScript] service instance for CloudScript execution APIs.
The [PlayFabEntityData] service instance for entity object and file APIs.
The [PlayFabEvents] service instance reserved for event and telemetry APIs.
The [PlayFabExperimentation] service instance for experimentation APIs.
The [PlayFabFriends] service instance for friends-list APIs.
The [PlayFabGroups] service instance for group membership and role APIs.
The [PlayFabInventory] service instance for inventory APIs.
The [PlayFabLocalization] service instance for localization APIs.
The [PlayFabPlayerData] service instance for player data APIs.
The [PlayFabStatistics] service instance for statistic APIs.
The [PlayFabTitleData] service instance for title data APIs.
The PlayFab title id used by the runtime.
The PlayFab endpoint used by the runtime.

signal.name: initialized
signal.description: Emitted when the PlayFab runtime has been successfully initialized.

signal.name: shutdown_completed
signal.description: Emitted when the PlayFab runtime has completed shutdown.
